title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
summary: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.

title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
summary: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”

title: Stocks Steady at Highs as Traders Await Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
summary: US stocks held steady at all-time highs as traders waited to see whether Washington and Iran could finally get a peace deal across the line and restore oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
